# Consolidated off/on verification — all 11 defenses vs the actual attack
# Regenerated by testbed/defenses/verify_all.sh on 2026-06-30T15:38:35Z
# (clean rebuilt image; SAVI is the reliable T6 control, FEISTEL is secondary).
# Each row: defense, OFF measurement (attack succeeds), ON measurement (attack blocked).

== T1  TRABELSI  (NAT/conntrack state exhaustion) ==
  PASS  TRABELSI       OFF client1=000 | ON client1=200
== T4  ESP_AEAD  (unencrypted-tunnel interception) ==
  PASS  ESP_AEAD       OFF 20 cleartext markers | ON 0
== T3/T5/T6  SAVI  (forged softwire source) ==
  PASS  SAVI           OFF 14 forged reach provider | ON 0 (closes T3/T5/T6)
== T6  FEISTEL_IPID  (secondary: defeats identifier prediction) ==
  PASS  FEISTEL_IPID   sequential-prediction hits over 2000 ids = 1 (counter would be 2000; prediction defeated, secondary to SAVI)
== T8/T10  PCP_OWNERSHIP  (THIRD_PARTY / PEER cross-subscriber) ==
  PASS  PCP_OWNERSHIP  OFF 5 cross-sub DNAT | ON 0
== T7  PCP_QUOTA  (per-subscriber pool exhaustion) ==
  PASS  PCP_QUOTA      OFF b4-2 REFUSED | ON b4-2 OK
== T9  PCP_AUTH  (forged ANNOUNCE epoch reset) ==
  PASS  PCP_AUTH       OFF 6 storms | ON 0 storms
== T2  NAT_LOG  (shared-IPv4 reputation attribution) ==
  PASS  NAT_LOG        OFF 0 records | ON 200 records
== T14/T15  SNMP_USM  (SNMP write / disclosure) ==
  PASS  SNMP_USM       OFF v2c-SET=2147483647 | ON OAM reads -1
== T12/T13  DHCPV6_AUTH  (rogue DHCPv6 AFTR-Name) ==
  PASS  DHCPV6_AUTH    OFF AFTR=aftr-evil.attacker.example. | ON AFTR=aftr.dslite.example.com.
== T11  DNS_0X20  (off-path DNS poisoning) ==
  PASS  DNS_0X20       OFF resolved to 2001:db8:cafe:0:143e:36ff:fe74:7d7 | ON resolved to <none>
================ 11 PASS, 0 FAIL ================
